Part.Source:
Event Start
&CteDocTip = TipoDocumentoCte.Nfe &CteTomDtaEmsDec = &Today // ConsultaNfe.LinkTarget = '_blank' // ConsultaNfe.Link = link('http://www.nfe.fazenda.gov.br/portal/consultaRecaptcha.aspx?tipoConsulta=completa&tipoConteudo=XbSeqxE8pl8=')
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do 'LoadVariablesFromWizardData'
&CteCarOtrCar.TooltipText = 'Ex: "FRIA", "GRANEL", "REFRIGERADA","Medidas: 12X12X12"'
Do 'AttributesSecurityCode' &EmpCod.Visible = False Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Grid.Rows = Page.Rows GridPercurso_Empowerer.GridInternalName = GridPercurso.InternalName GridPercurso.Rows = Page.Rows
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event Grid.Load
If &CteFinEms <> FinalidadeCte.Complemento &UDelete.JSEvent( "onclick", "confirm ( 'Tem certeza que deseja excluir esse documento?')") &TotCteDocVlrTotNtf = 0 &CteDocTotPso = 0 For Each Order EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod,CteDocTip Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where CteCod = &CteCod Where CteDocTip = &CteDocTip
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &UDelete.FromImage(ActionDelete) &UDelete.TooltipText = "Delete item"
&UUpdate.FromImage(ActionUpdate) &UUpdate.TooltipText = "Alterar"
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
&GridEmpCod = EmpCod &GridFilCod = FilCod &GridCteCod = CteCod &GridCteDocCod = CteDocCod &GridCteDocNro = CteDocNro &GridCteDocSer = CteDocSer &GridCteDocChvNfe = CteDocChvNfe &GridCteDocTipOri = CteDocTipOri &GridCteDocDta = CteDocDta &GridCteDocVlrTotNtf = CteDocVlrTotNtf &GridCteDocTip = CteDocTip &GridCteDocTotPso = CteDocTotPso &TotCteDocVlrTotNtf += CteDocVlrTotNtf &CteDocTotPso += CteDocTotPso &gridCteDocDes = CteDocDes &GridCteDocNcmPre = CteDocNcmPre Load EndFor If &TotCteDocVlrTotNtf > 0 &CteCarVlrTot = &TotCteDocVlrTotNtf EndIf If &CteDocTotPso > 0 &BrtCteDocPes = &CteDocTotPso EndIf
EndIf
EndEvent
Event GridPercurso.Load
For Each order EmpCod, FilCod,CteCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where CteCod = &CteCod
&gridCtePerCod = CtePerCod &gridCtePerUfeCod = CtePerUfeCod
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &DeletePercurso.FromImage(ActionDelete) &DeletePercurso.TooltipText = ""
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
load EndFor
EndEvent
Event Enter
&CheckRequiredFieldsResult = True If &CteModCod = '57' ValidaCargaCte.Call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&CteCod,&Count) Do case Case (&CteCarQtd = 0 and &LiqCteDocPes = 0 and &BrtCteDocPes = 0 AND &M3CteCarQtd = 0 and &CteFinEms <> FinalidadeCte.Complemento and &CteFinEms <> FinalidadeCte.Anulacao) &MsgErro = 'ATENÇÃO! Nenhuma informação de (QUANTIDADE) ou (PESO LÍQUIDO) ou (PESO BRUTO) ou (METROS CÚBICO) adicionada para este CT-e, ao menos uma dessas deve ser preenchida de acordo com a carga. Verifique!' msg( DVMessageBasicNotification.Udp(!"Erro!", &MsgErro,DVMessageType.error, "", DVMessageBoolean.True) ) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False
Case &Count = 0 and &CteFinEms <> FinalidadeCte.Complemento and &CteFinEms <> FinalidadeCte.Anulacao &MsgErro = 'ATENÇÃO! Nenhuma documento adicionado para este CT-e Verifique!' msg( DVMessageBasicNotification.Udp(!"Erro!", &MsgErro,DVMessageType.error, "", DVMessageBoolean.True) ) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False
Case &IsErro = True and &CteFinEms = FinalidadeCte.Complemento &MsgErro = 'ATENÇÃO! Chave do CT-e de complemento inválida. Verifique!' msg( DVMessageBasicNotification.Udp(!"Erro!", &MsgErro,DVMessageType.error, "", DVMessageBoolean.True) ) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False
Case &IsErroAnulacao = True and &CteFinEms = FinalidadeCte.Anulacao &MsgErro = 'ATENÇÃO! Chave do CT-e de anulação inválida. Verifique!' &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False msg( DVMessageBasicNotification.Udp(!"Erro!", &MsgErro,DVMessageType.error, "", DVMessageBoolean.True) )
Case &CteTomChvCpl.Trim().IsEmpty() and &CteFinEms = FinalidadeCte.Complemento &MsgErro = 'ATENÇÃO! Chave do CT-e de complemento é obrigatória favor informa-lá. Verifique!' msg( DVMessageBasicNotification.Udp(!"Erro!", &MsgErro,DVMessageType.error, "", DVMessageBoolean.True) ) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False
Case &CteTomChvAnaOri.Trim().IsEmpty() and &CteFinEms = FinalidadeCte.Anulacao &MsgErro = 'ATENÇÃO! Chave original do CT-e a ser anulado é obrigatória favor informa-lá. Verifique!' msg( DVMessageBasicNotification.Udp(!"Erro!", &MsgErro,DVMessageType.error, "", DVMessageBoolean.True) ) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False Case &CteTomChvAnaOri.Trim().IsEmpty() and &CteFinEms = FinalidadeCte.Anulacao &MsgErro = 'ATENÇÃO! Chave original do CT-e a ser anulado é obrigatória favor informa-lá. Verifique!' msg( DVMessageBasicNotification.Udp(!"Erro!", &MsgErro,DVMessageType.error, "", DVMessageBoolean.True) ) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False
EndCase
Else Do case Case &AuxCteCarQtd < 1 msg( DVMessageBasicNotification.Udp(!"Erro!", 'Quantidade não pode ser menor que 1. Verifique!' ,DVMessageType.error, "", DVMessageBoolean.True) ) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False Case &CteSerDes.Trim().IsEmpty() msg( DVMessageBasicNotification.Udp(!"Erro!", 'Descrição não pode ser vazia. Verifique!' ,DVMessageType.error, "", DVMessageBoolean.True) ) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndCase EndIf
If &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = True
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do 'CheckRequiredFields' If &CheckRequiredFieldsResult AND not &HasValidationErrors Do 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' WPCte(!'Carga', !'ValorImp', false) EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
Endif
EndEvent
Event 'WizardPrevious'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
WPCte(!'Carga', !'Geral', true)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoNovo'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Seguradora.PopUp(TrnMode.Insert, 0, 0)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoUInsert'
&Round = Random()*1000 Do Case Case &CteDocTip = TipoDocumentoCte.NF // NF WPAddDoc.Popup(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&CteCod,TipoDocumentoCte.NF,0,&Round) Case &CteDocTip = TipoDocumentoCte.NFe // NF-E WPAddDoc.Popup(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&CteCod,TipoDocumentoCte.Nfe,0,&Round) Case &CteDocTip = TipoDocumentoCte.Otros//Outros WPAddDoc.Popup(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&CteCod,TipoDocumentoCte.Otros,0,&Round) EndCase Refresh
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoAbrirSite'
link('http://www.nfe.fazenda.gov.br/portal/consultaRecaptcha.aspx?tipoConsulta=completa&tipoConteudo=XbSeqxE8pl8=')
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoDeletar'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
DVelop_ConfirmPanel_BtnDeletar.Confirm()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event DVelop_ConfirmPanel_BtnDeletar.Close
If DVelop_ConfirmPanel_BtnDeletar.Result = !'Yes' DeletaDocCte.Call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&CteCod,0) Refresh EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//Ask If DVelop_ConfirmPanel_BtnDeletar.Result = !'Yes'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoAddPercurso'
CTE_Percurso.Call('ADD', &EmpCod, &FilCod, &CteCod, 0, &addCtePerUfeCod) &addCtePerUfeCod.SetEmpty() GridPercurso.Refresh()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Sub 'LoadVariablesFromWizardData'
If 1=2
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &EmpCod = &WizardData.Carga.EmpCod &AuxCteTomChvAnaOri = &WizardData.Carga.AuxCteTomChvAnaOri &CteTomChvAnaOri = &WizardData.Carga.CteTomChvAnaOri &CteTomDtaEmsDec = &WizardData.Carga.CteTomDtaEmsDec &CteTomChvCpl = &WizardData.Carga.CteTomChvCpl &M3CteCarQtd = &WizardData.Carga.M3CteCarQtd &CteCarQtd = &WizardData.Carga.CteCarQtd &BrtCteDocPes = &WizardData.Carga.BrtCteDocPes &LiqCteDocPes = &WizardData.Carga.LiqCteDocPes &CteCarProPre = &WizardData.Carga.CteCarProPre &CteCarVlrTot = &WizardData.Carga.CteCarVlrTot &CteCarOtrCar = &WizardData.Carga.CteCarOtrCar &CteSegApl = &WizardData.Carga.CteSegApl &CteSegNom = &WizardData.Carga.CteSegNom &CteSegRef = &WizardData.Carga.CteSegRef &CteSegCod = &WizardData.Carga.CteSegCod &CteDocTip = &WizardData.Carga.CteDocTip &AddCtePerUfeCod = &WizardData.Carga.AddCtePerUfeCod &CteSerDes = &WizardData.Carga.CteSerDes &AuxCteCarQtd = &WizardData.Carga.AuxCteCarQtd
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
Else &WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &EmpCod = &WizardData.Geral.EmpCod &FilCod = &WizardData.Geral.FilCod &CteCod = &WizardData.Geral.CteCod Do 'load' Do Case Case &CteFinEms = FinalidadeCte.Complemento TableAnulacao.Visible = False TableComplemento.Visible = True TableNormal.Visible = False TableSubstituicao.Visible = false
Case &CteFinEms = FinalidadeCte.Anulacao TableAnulacao.Visible = true TableComplemento.Visible = False TableNormal.Visible = False TableSubstituicao.Visible = false
Case &CteFinEms = FinalidadeCte.Substituicao TableAnulacao.Visible = False TableComplemento.Visible = False TableNormal.Visible = True TableSubstituicao.Visible = true
Otherwise TableAnulacao.Visible = False TableComplemento.Visible = False TableNormal.Visible = True TableSubstituicao.Visible = false
EndCase
EndIf
if &CteCod.IsEmpty() wwCTE.Link() Endif
EndSub
Sub 'SaveVariablesToWizardData'
If 1 = 2
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &WizardData.Carga.EmpCod = &EmpCod &WizardData.Carga.AuxCteTomChvAnaOri = &AuxCteTomChvAnaOri &WizardData.Carga.CteTomChvAnaOri = &CteTomChvAnaOri &WizardData.Carga.CteTomDtaEmsDec = &CteTomDtaEmsDec &WizardData.Carga.CteTomChvCpl = &CteTomChvCpl &WizardData.Carga.M3CteCarQtd = &M3CteCarQtd &WizardData.Carga.CteCarQtd = &CteCarQtd &WizardData.Carga.BrtCteDocPes = &BrtCteDocPes &WizardData.Carga.LiqCteDocPes = &LiqCteDocPes &WizardData.Carga.CteCarProPre = &CteCarProPre &WizardData.Carga.CteCarVlrTot = &CteCarVlrTot &WizardData.Carga.CteCarOtrCar = &CteCarOtrCar &WizardData.Carga.CteSegApl = &CteSegApl &WizardData.Carga.CteSegNom = &CteSegNom &WizardData.Carga.CteSegRef = &CteSegRef &WizardData.Carga.CteSegCod = &CteSegCod &WizardData.Carga.CteDocTip = &CteDocTip &WizardData.Carga.AddCtePerUfeCod = &AddCtePerUfeCod &WizardData.Carga.CteSerDes = &CteSerDes &WizardData.Carga.AuxCteCarQtd = &AuxCteCarQtd &WizardData.Carga.Grid.Clear() For Each Line in Grid &GridItem = new() &GridItem.GridCteDocNro = &GridCteDocNro &GridItem.GridCteDocSer = &GridCteDocSer &GridItem.GridCteDocChvNfe = &GridCteDocChvNfe &GridItem.GridCteDocTipOri = &GridCteDocTipOri &GridItem.GridCteDocDes = &GridCteDocDes &GridItem.GridCteDocDta = &GridCteDocDta &GridItem.GridCteDocVlrTotNtf = &GridCteDocVlrTotNtf &GridItem.GridEmpCod = &GridEmpCod &GridItem.GridFilCod = &GridFilCod &GridItem.GridCteCod = &GridCteCod &GridItem.GridCteDocCod = &GridCteDocCod &GridItem.GridCteDocTip = &GridCteDocTip &GridItem.GridCteDocTotPso = &GridCteDocTotPso &GridItem.GridCteDocNcmPre = &GridCteDocNcmPre
&WizardData.Carga.Grid.Add(&GridItem) EndFor &WizardData.Carga.GridPercurso.Clear() For Each Line in GridPercurso &GridPercursoItem = new() &GridPercursoItem.gridCtePerCod = &gridCtePerCod &GridPercursoItem.gridCtePerUfeCod = &gridCtePerUfeCod
&WizardData.Carga.GridPercurso.Add(&GridPercursoItem) EndFor &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpVlrTotTri = &EmptyWizardData.ValorImp.CteImpVlrTotTri &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpTriVlrPis = &EmptyWizardData.ValorImp.CteImpTriVlrPis &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpTriVlrCofins = &EmptyWizardData.ValorImp.CteImpTriVlrCofins &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpTriAliInss = &EmptyWizardData.ValorImp.CteImpTriAliInss &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpTriVlrInss = &EmptyWizardData.ValorImp.CteImpTriVlrInss &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpTriVlrCsll = &EmptyWizardData.ValorImp.CteImpTriVlrCsll &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpTriVlrIr = &EmptyWizardData.ValorImp.CteImpTriVlrIr &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpAliTotTri = &EmptyWizardData.ValorImp.CteImpAliTotTri &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpAli = &EmptyWizardData.ValorImp.CteImpAli &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpVlr = &EmptyWizardData.ValorImp.CteImpVlr &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpVbc = &EmptyWizardData.ValorImp.CteImpVbc &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpPerRed = &EmptyWizardData.ValorImp.CteImpPerRed &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpAliRet = &EmptyWizardData.ValorImp.CteImpAliRet &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpVbcRet = &EmptyWizardData.ValorImp.CteImpVbcRet &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpVstRet = &EmptyWizardData.ValorImp.CteImpVstRet &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpVlrCre = &EmptyWizardData.ValorImp.CteImpVlrCre &WizardData.ValorImp.CteCfop = &EmptyWizardData.ValorImp.CteCfop &WizardData.ValorImp.ImpCfoNom = &EmptyWizardData.ValorImp.ImpCfoNom &WizardData.ValorImp.CtePosPre = &EmptyWizardData.ValorImp.CtePosPre &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpCst = &EmptyWizardData.ValorImp.CteImpCst &WizardData.ValorImp.CteVlrTotPreSer = &EmptyWizardData.ValorImp.CteVlrTotPreSer &WizardData.ValorImp.CteVlrRecSer = &EmptyWizardData.ValorImp.CteVlrRecSer &WizardData.ValorImp.IsGeraDuplicatas = &EmptyWizardData.ValorImp.IsGeraDuplicatas &WizardData.ValorImp.GridPrestacao.Clear() &WebSession.Set(&WebSessionKey, &WizardData.ToJson())
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
Else &WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &WizardData.Carga.CteSerDes = &CteSerDes &WizardData.Carga.CteDocTip = &CteDocTip &WizardData.Carga.CteSegCod = &CteSegCod &WizardData.Carga.CteSegNom = &CteSegNom &WizardData.Carga.CteSegApl = &CteSegApl &WizardData.Carga.CteCarProPre = &CteCarProPre &WizardData.Carga.CteCarVlrTot = &CteCarVlrTot &WizardData.Carga.M3CteCarQtd = &M3CteCarQtd &WizardData.Carga.BrtCteDocPes = &BrtCteDocPes &WizardData.Carga.LiqCteDocPes = &LiqCteDocPes &WizardData.Carga.CteCarQtd = &CteCarQtd &WizardData.Carga.CteCarProPre = &CteCarProPre &WizardData.Carga.CteCarOtrCar = &CteCarOtrCar &WizardData.Carga.AuxCteCarQtd = &AuxCteCarQtd &WebSession.Set(&WebSessionKey, &WizardData.ToJson())
&PadObs = Padr(trim(&CteCarProPre),60,' ') &PadObs += Padr(trim(&CteCarOtrCar),30,' ') &PadObs += Padr(trim(&CteSerDes),30,' ') PadraoUsuario.Call('G', 'WPCTECARGA', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) If &CteSts = Status_Nfe.Digitando //so altera se tiver digitando GravacteCarga.Call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&CteCod,&CteSegCod,&CteSegRef,&CteSegNom,&CteSegApl,&CteCarProPre,&CteCarVlrTot,&CteCarOtrCar,&M3CteCarQtd,&BrtCteDocPes,&LiqCteDocPes,&CteCarQtd,&CteFinEms,&CteTomChvCpl,&CteModCod,&CteSerDes,&AuxCteCarQtd,&CteTomChvAnaOri,&CteTomDtaEmsDec,&AuxCteTomChvAnaOri,&CteTomChvAna,&CteTomChvEmt,&CteTomVlrDoc,&CteTomDtaEmsDoc) EndIf
EndIf
EndSub
Sub 'CheckRequiredFields'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&CheckRequiredFieldsResult = True If (&CteFinEms <> FinalidadeCte.Complemento and &CteFinEms <> FinalidadeCte.Anulacao and &CteModCod = '57') AND &CteCarProPre.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Produto'), DVMessageType.error, &CteCarProPre.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&CteFinEms <> FinalidadeCte.Complemento and &CteFinEms <> FinalidadeCte.Anulacao and &CteModCod = '57') AND &CteCarVlrTot.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Valor Tot. Carga '), DVMessageType.error, &CteCarVlrTot.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'AttributesSecurityCode'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
If &CteFinEms <> FinalidadeCte.Complemento and &CteFinEms <> FinalidadeCte.Anulacao and &CteModCod = '57' CteCarProPre_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-4 RequiredDataContentCell' Else CteCarProPre_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-4 DataContentCell' EndIf If &CteFinEms <> FinalidadeCte.Complemento and &CteFinEms <> FinalidadeCte.Anulacao and &CteModCod = '57' CteCarVlrTot_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-4 RequiredDataContentCell' Else CteCarVlrTot_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-4 DataContentCell' EndIf
TableServico.Visible = (&CteModCod ='67') If not(&CteModCod ='57') DVPanel_doc_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else DVPanel_doc_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12' EndIf seq.Visible = (&CteModCod ='67') If not(&CteModCod ='57') DVPanel_TotDoc_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else DVPanel_TotDoc_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 CellMarginTop' EndIf TableImport.Visible = (&CteDocTip = TipoDocumentoCte.Nfe)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Event &CteTomChvCpl.IsValid
iF NOT &CteTomChvCpl.Trim().IsEmpty() ValidaChaveNota.Call(&CteTomChvCpl,&IsErro) EndIf
EndEvent
Event &CteTomChvAnaOri.IsValid
If Not &CteTomChvAnaOri.Trim().IsEmpty() ValidaChaveNota.Call(&CteTomChvAnaOri,&IsErroAnulacao) EndIf
EndEvent
Event &CteSegRef.IsValid
If &CteSegRef <> 0 Do 'GetSeguradora' EndIf
EndEvent
Event &UDelete.Click
DeletaDocCte.Call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&CteCod,&GridCteDocCod) Refresh
EndEvent
Event &CteDocTip.IsValid
Do 'GridVisible'
EndEvent
Event &CteDocTip.Click
do 'AttributesSecurityCode' Do 'GridVisible'
EndEvent
Event &UUpdate.Click
&Round = Random()*1000 Do Case Case &GridCteDocTip = TipoDocumentoCte.NF // NF WPAddDoc.Popup(&GridEmpCod,&GridFilCod,&GridCteCod,&GridCteDocTip,&GridCteDocCod,&Round) Case &GridCteDocTip = TipoDocumentoCte.NFe // NF-E WPAddDoc.Popup(&GridEmpCod,&GridFilCod,&GridCteCod,&GridCteDocTip,&GridCteDocCod,&Round) Case &GridCteDocTip = TipoDocumentoCte.Otros //Outros WPAddDoc.Popup(&GridEmpCod,&GridFilCod,&GridCteCod,&GridCteDocTip,&GridCteDocCod,&Round) EndCase Refresh
EndEvent
Event FileUpload1.UploadComplete
For &FileUploadData in &FileUploadDataColl If not &FileUploadData.File.IsEmpty() &File.Source=&FileUploadData.File &Extensao = &FileUploadData.Extension &NomeArquivoXml = &File.GetAbsoluteName() /// Pega o local temporario &File.Close()
//=====Se a extesão nao for csv, envia mensagem===== Do Case Case &Extensao.ToLower().Trim() = 'xml' GravaCteDocImp.Call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&CteCod, &NomeArquivoXml, &mensagem) if not &mensagem.IsEmpty() msg(&mensagem) Endif
Case &Extensao.ToLower().Trim() = 'pdf' // GravaCteDocImpCvale_Extrato.Call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&CteCod, &NomeArquivoXml) EndCase
EndiF EndFor
&FileUploadDataColl.clear() FileUpload1.Clear() Refresh
EndEvent
Event &AuxCteTomChvAnaOri.IsValid
If Not &AuxCteTomChvAnaOri.IsEmpty() ValidaChaveNota.Call(&AuxCteTomChvAnaOri,&IsErroOrigem) EndIf
EndEvent
Event Refresh
Do 'GridVisible'
EndEvent
Event &DeletePercurso.Click
CTE_PErcurso.Call('DEL', &EmpCod, &FilCod, &CteCod, &gridCtePerCod, '') gridPercurso.Refresh()
EndEvent
Sub 'GridVisible'
Do Case Case &CteDocTip = TipoDocumentoCte.NF &GridCteDocChvNfe.Visible = False &GridCteDocNro.Visible = True &GridCteDocSer.Visible = True &GridCteDocDta.Visible = False &GridCteDocTipOri.Visible = False &GridCteDocVlrTotNtf.Visible = False &GridCteDocTotPso.Visible = False &gridCteDocDes.Visible = false Case &CteDocTip = TipoDocumentoCte.NFe &GridCteDocChvNfe.Visible = True &GridCteDocNro.Visible = true &GridCteDocSer.Visible = False &GridCteDocDta.Visible = False &GridCteDocTipOri.Visible = False &GridCteDocVlrTotNtf.Visible = True &GridCteDocTotPso.Visible = true &gridCteDocDes.Visible = false Case &CteDocTip = TipoDocumentoCte.Otros &GridCteDocChvNfe.Visible = False &GridCteDocNro.Visible = True &GridCteDocSer.Visible = False &GridCteDocDta.Visible = True &GridCteDocTipOri.Visible = True &GridCteDocVlrTotNtf.Visible = True &GridCteDocTotPso.Visible = False &gridCteDocDes.Visible = True EndCase
EndSub
Sub 'load'
For each order EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where CteCod = &CteCod &CteFinEms = CteFinEms &CteSts = CteSts &CteModCod = CteModCod Do Case Case CteFinEms = FinalidadeCte.Complemento &CteTomChvCpl = CteTomChvCpl Case CteFinEms = FinalidadeCte.Anulacao &CteTomChvAnaOri = CteTomChvAnaOri &CteTomDtaEmsDec = CteTomDtaEmsDec Case CteFinEms = FinalidadeCte.Substituicao &AuxCteTomChvAnaOri = CteTomChvAnaOri &CteTomChvAna = CteTomChvAna &CteTomChvEmt = CteTomChvEmt &CteTomVlrDoc = CteTomVlrDoc &CteTomDtaEmsDoc = CteTomDtaEmsDoc Otherwise
If CteModCod = '57' &CteCarProPre = CteCarProPre &CteCarVlrTot = CteCarVlrTot &CteCarOtrCar = CteCarOtrCar For Each Order EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod,CteDocTip &CteDocTip = CteDocTip exit EndFor
For each order EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod,(CteSegCod) &CteSegCod = CteSegCod &CteSegNom = CteSegNom &CteSegApl = CteSegApl exit EndFor
For each order EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod,CteCarCod If CteCarUnd = UnidadeMedidaCte.UNIDADE AND CteCarTip = 'UNIDADE' &CteCarQtd = CteCarQtd EndIf
If CteCarUnd = UnidadeMedidaCte.M3 and CteCarTip = 'METROS CUBICOS' &M3CteCarQtd = CteCarQtd EndIf
If CteCarUnd = UnidadeMedidaCte.KG and CteCarTip = 'PESO BRUTO' &BrtCteDocPes = CteCarQtd EndIf
If CteCarUnd = UnidadeMedidaCte.KG and CteCarTip = 'PESO LIQUIDO' &LiqCteDocPes = CteCarQtd EndIf EndFor Else &CteSerDes = CteSerDes TablePercurso.Visible = iif(CteIniUfe <> CteTerUfe,true,false)
If CteTipSer = tipoServicoCte.TransportePessoas &AuxCteCarQtd.Caption = 'Nro passageiros' Else &AuxCteCarQtd.Caption = 'Qtd Malotes/Vol' EndIf
Do 'Seguro'
For each order EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod,CteCarCod If CteCarUnd = UnidadeMedidaCte.UNIDADE AND CteCarTip = 'UNIDADE' &auxCteCarQtd = CteCarQtd EndIf EndFor EndIf Endcase exit EndFor
PadraoUsuario.Call('L', 'WPCTECARGA', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) If not &PadObs.IsEmpty() If &CteCarProPre.Trim().IsEmpty() &CteCarProPre = trim(Substr(&PadObs,1,60)) EndIf
If &CteCarOtrCar.Trim().IsEmpty() &CteCarOtrCar = trim(Substr(&PadObs,61,30)) EndIf
If &CteSerDes.Trim().IsEmpty() &CteSerDes = trim(Substr(&PadObs,91,30)) EndIf EndIf
EndSub
Sub 'Seguro'
For each order EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod,CteSegCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where CteCod = &CteCod // Where CteSegCod = &CteSegCod &CteSegRef = CteSegRef &CteSegCod = CteSegCod &CteSegNom = CteSegNom &CteSegApl = CteSegApl exit EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'GetSeguradora'
For Each Order EmpCod, SegCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where SegCod = &CteSegRef &CteSegNom = SegNom &CteSegApl = SegApo Exit EndFor
EndSub

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Tomador Chave de acesso do CT-e original a ser anulado e substituído

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Tomador Chave de acesso do CT-e emitido pelo Tomador

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Tomador Data de emissão do documento fiscal.
